sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) shouting for joy, Job 3:7 20:5 . Pl. ֹות Psa 63:6.

(2) plur. רְנָנִים Job 39:13, seqq. ostriches, poet. for the common בְּנֹות יַעֲנָה, called either from the stridulous sound of their wings (see Job loc. cit. verse 12 Job 39:12, compare רָנָה), or from their wailing noise (see רָנַן Lam 2:19); compare Arab. زمار the female ostrich, so called from its song. Vulg. struthio. See Bochart, Hieroz. ii. page 24.
